data.name: My Giant Sexy Sensei Bullies Me 4
data.detailed_description:
After Kirita, a fellow classmate that you've only interacted with a few times, storms into you and Yuna's secret meetup room, she tries to get Yuna to stop bullying you. Yuna quickly explains to Kirita that she's not bullying you, but that the two of you instead have a secret BDSM relationship. At first, Kirita finds it hard to believe, but she eventually accepts it and apologizes for ruining your BDSM session. Kirita promises to keep your relationship a secret, and all of you think that it's the end of the matter, but the next day, Kirita has a strange request: she wants to watch the two of you when you have your next femdom BDSM session.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Kirita, your classmate, wants to watch Yuna dominate you.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
